content: maxTicksPerTree default is 100_000 (not 1000) in both configuration.ts and settings-repository.ts default row.

name: tick-range-queries
description: TickRepository range queries: findRange(from,to) uses inclusive WHERE tickId >= / <=; findBefore uses DESC order + reverse() to return ascending results; getTickBounds uses MIN/MAX/COUNT aggregate — returns null when count=0.
